notable_excerpts: We won three awards for exceptional efforts in ESG, including validation by the Science-Based Targets Initiative for Net Zero Goals.
We are placed on the A-list for CDP climate change and for CDP water stewardship.
We have gathered encouraging accolades and recognitions for our people policy and sustainability policies.
We have continued to focus on our employees through also speeding up a lot of the internal processes so that employees feel that they’re also seeing the benefits of speed within the organisation.
We want to drive diverse and inclusive organization. There's multiple diversity metrics that we drive for.
We have established fairly strong guardrails. So, to that degree we will always be prudent about the deals that we sign up to because we are very focused on delivering on our margin commitment.
We have a whole contract management team that we have set up which looks at each and every aspect of this deal and makes sure that the diligence is very strong.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted significant achievements in environmental sustainability, particularly with awards and recognitions for net zero goals and CDP listings. Social aspects focused on employee satisfaction, learning, and diversity initiatives. Governance was strong with emphasis on risk management and transparency in deal processes.
strengths: Focus on employee satisfaction and development.
Robust governance practices in risk management.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on biodiversity initiatives.
Social disclosures could benefit from more quantitative metrics.
